answers: Best safari destinations: Serengeti (Tanzania), Masai Mara (Kenya), Kruger (South Africa), Sundarbans (Bangladesh).
Safari tips: go during dry season (animals gather at water), bring binoculars, wear neutral colors, and book early.
Safari planning: choose between self-drive and guided tour, book accommodation in advance, get travel insurance.
African safari: expect to see the Big 5 (lion, leopard, elephant, buffalo, rhino). Early morning game drives are best.
